## Checklist

<!-- Please ensure your PR meets the following requirements. -->

- [ ] I have read the **[contributing guidelines](CONTRIBUTING.md)** (if applicable).
- [ ] My code follows the project's coding style (PSR-12).
- [ ] I have added or updated **tests** to cover my changes.
- [ ] All existing and new tests pass (`composer test`).
- [ ] Static analysis passes (`composer phpstan`).
- [ ] Coding standards pass (`composer phpcs`).
